text: Hello and welcome to HeadRush Products, BeerPongUSA.com.
I'm Aaron, the founder of HeadRush Products, and today we're going to talk about the most
unique beer pong game in history, Spin Pong.
It's a spinning beer pong rack that runs on two AA batteries for four or five hours, and
it puts a new spin on the game.
You just shoot the ball rather than stationary cups, you shoot the cups that are moving around.
You can be a novice and have a party and it's great fun for hours, or you can actually,
if you're a professional or someone who plays in tournaments, you can gain some new skills
See if I can get one in.
Thanks for watching, and see us again at BeerPongUSA.com.
